title: The appointment of his son Talhah as successor over Khurasan and the East; a variant account of this episode
description: The appointment of his son Talhah as successor over Khurasan and the East; a variant account of this episode. Recorded under the year 206 AH (c. 821 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
